app.name: Prayer Times
app.tagline: Prayer times focused on Sweden — with sources tuned for Swedish cities and flexible options elsewhere.

home.monthTimesLink: Prayer times for the whole month
home.localFallbackNotice: On-device calculation — connect to refresh from your provider
home.lastGpsCoordsNotice: Using last known location — GPS unavailable
home.exactAlarmDenied: Prayer alerts need exact-alarm permission for accurate timing. Tap to grant.
home.notifPermDenied: Notification permission denied — prayer alerts won't fire. Tap to open Settings.

errors.locationNeededBody: Prayer times use your approximate position. Grant location access in system settings, then try again.
errors.gpsPermission: Location permission is required to use device location.

month.locationNotReadyBody: Open Home and load today's times once so this screen can use your GPS position.

settings.themeHelp: System matches your device light or dark mode. Turn on System colors to use the platform palette in the app (including Material You on Android). Buttons and accents follow your phone’s primary color so the app matches your wallpaper when dynamic color is available.
settings.systemDynamicColorsHelp: Uses your device’s semantic and dynamic colors in the app when theme is System. Pure black (OLED) still darkens backgrounds when dark mode is on.
settings.pureBlackHelp: True black background in dark mode for OLED displays.
settings.providerAutoHelp: In Sweden, prayer times use the Sweden source (listed cities); outside Sweden, AlAdhan. Pick a source below to lock one provider.
settings.manualSearchHelp: Tap a search result to apply it right away, or edit coordinates and press Apply below.
settings.calcHiddenSweden: Sweden uses prayer times per listed city. Your position is reverse-geocoded to match that city; only for Sweden.
settings.calcHiddenPraytimes: PrayTimes.dev applies its own published rules (see prayertimes.dev). Only madhab / Asr school applies here; method list is hidden.
settings.prayerAlertsHelp: Scheduled for the five daily prayers (Fajr–Isha). Android may require exact-alarm access for reliable timing.
settings.prePrayerReminderHelp: Optional second notification before each prayer.
settings.languageHelp: Select the app language. Arabic and Urdu use right-to-left layout.
settings.widgetHighlightDynamicHelp: Pick Dynamic to follow your phone accent for the next prayer highlight. On Android 12+, this follows wallpaper-based dynamic color.
settings.widgetConfigureHint: You can also touch and hold the widget → settings (gear) to adjust the same options on Android.
settings.notificationSoundDefaultHelp: Uses your device default notification sound.
settings.notificationSoundVoiceHelp: Built-in voice included in this app build.
settings.prayerOffsetsHelp: Nudge each prayer by ±{{max}} minutes to match your local mosque.

locationSetup.headline: Set your location
locationSetup.sub: Prayer times depend on where you are. Choose one of the options below — you can change this later in Settings.
locationSetup.manualSub: Search and tap a result to finish — or type latitude and longitude below and press Continue.

provider.autoSub: Sweden source in Sweden; AlAdhan elsewhere.
provider.footer: Country-specific sources use official or national prayer tables where we integrate them. More regions may be added over time.

aladhan.desc: api.aladhan.com — large method list, coordinates worldwide; very widely used.

prayertimes_dev.desc: Independent API — UK-style angles & offsets; Hanafi/Shafi; global coordinates.

local_adhan.desc: Calculated on your phone with Batoul Adhan — no network prayer API.

islamiska_forbundet.desc: Prayer times for listed Swedish cities; your location is matched to the nearest city in the list.

compass.needLocationBody: Set a location in Settings or open Home once with GPS so we can compute the Qibla direction.
compass.hint: Hold the phone flat and move away from metal. Align the Qibla arrow with “Phone front” when you face the Qibla.
compass.signalHelp: Based on magnetic field level and stability. Move away from metal and electronics if it stays low.
compass.signalWeakBody: Move away from metal, magnets, and electronics. Remove magnetic phone accessories, then make a slow figure-8 motion to recalibrate.
compass.motionDetectedBody: Too much movement can make direction jump. Hold the phone flat and still for a few seconds, away from moving vehicles or speakers.
compass.motionPermissionDeniedBody: Compass access is denied on iOS. Allow Motion & Fitness access in system settings, then reopen this screen.
compass.unsupportedBody: This device does not provide a usable magnetometer (or access failed). The live compass is turned off. Use the bearing below with a physical compass or map.
compass.checkingCompassWithPrompt: Starting compass… If prompted on iOS, allow Motion & Fitness access.
compass.a11yDialLive: Qibla compass. Rotate {{deg}} degrees to face Qibla.
compass.a11yDialChecking: Qibla compass. Waiting for sensor data.
compass.a11ySignal_weak: Compass signal: weak. Try moving to an open area.
compass.a11ySignal_very_weak: Compass signal: very weak. Accuracy may be limited.

placeSearch.label: Search city or address
placeSearch.hint: Results from OpenStreetMap (Nominatim). Use respectfully — not for bulk geocoding.

support.title: Tip the developer
support.help: Optional one-time tip. Payment is processed by your app store and goes to the app publisher. You can tip again anytime.
support.unavailable: Tip purchases are not available yet (check your store connection or product setup).

locations.title: Saved locations
locations.empty: Save the current location to switch quickly later.

quran.comingSoon: Full text for this surah will arrive in a future data update.

mosques.noneFound: No mosques found nearby. Try expanding the search radius.
mosques.needLocation: Set a location first so we can search nearby.
mosques.error: Couldn't reach the mosque database. Please try again.

welcome.title: Welcome
welcome.body: A pleasant, private prayer-times app. No analytics, no trackers — just calm reminders for the five daily prayers.

location.title: Your location
location.body: We use your approximate position to calculate accurate prayer times. Coordinates stay encrypted on this device — they never leave it.

notifications.title: Prayer alerts
notifications.body: We can quietly notify you at each prayer time. You can pick a sound, set a reminder, or turn this off any time.

exactAlarms.title: Exact-time alerts
exactAlarms.body: On newer Android, prayer alerts need an extra permission so they fire on time, not minutes late.

backup.exportHelp: Save your settings, saved locations, prayer journal, and fasting log to a JSON file. Open it later to restore.
backup.restoreHelp: Paste a backup JSON below and tap Restore to preview it. The app will confirm before applying.
backup.restorePreviewBody: {{settings}} settings, {{presets}} saved locations, {{journal}} journal entries, {{fasting}} fasting days. Apply this on next pass.
backup.notAnEnvelope: That file does not look like a Prayer Times backup.
backup.privacyNote: Backups stay on your device until you share them. Coordinates and journal entries can be encrypted with a password in a future update — keep your backup file private until then.

fasting.statusRecommended: A Sunnah voluntary fast falls on this date.
fasting.privacyNote: Fasting history stays encrypted on your device.
